nodeList.removeConfirm.message: Remove device "{name}"? It will need to be paired again.

pair.intro.message: Run the Coding Bridge agent on your computer, then enter its pairing code here to control it from the web.

pair.step2.message: Start it and follow the prompt:

pair.step3.message: Enter the pairing code it shows below.

pair.usedCode.message: This pairing code has already been used.

permission.subtitle.message: The agent wants to use a tool. Approve to continue.

session.noDevice.message: Select a device to start coding.

session.deviceOffline.message: This device is offline. Start the Coding Bridge agent on it to continue.

session.nodeId.description: Diagnostic label for the node id

session.sessionId.description: Diagnostic label for the session id

session.traceId.description: Diagnostic label for the trace id

session.startHint.message: Send a message to start a session on this device.

session.promptPlaceholder.message: Send a message to the agent…

session.retry.description: Re-run the last prompt after a failure

session.editPrompt.description: Edit a sent prompt and resend it as a new turn

session.editingBanner.message: Editing — sending rewinds the conversation to this point.
session.editingBanner.description: Banner shown while editing a past prompt

session.editRestoreCode.description: Checkbox to also roll back file changes when editing

session.editSubmit.description: Submit an edited prompt (rewind and re-run)

session.enterHint.message: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.

history.intro.message: جلسات Claude Code وCodex السابقة على هذا الجهاز.

history.empty.message: لا يوجد سجل على هذا الجهاز.

history.readonly.message: محادثة Codex هذه للقراءة فقط ولا يمكن متابعتها. ابدأ جلسة جديدة لمواصلة البرمجة.

history.running.description: Marks a history conversation that is currently live on the device

history.resumeHint.message: سيؤدي إرسال رسالة إلى استئناف هذه المحادثة على الجهاز.

session.permissionModeDefault.description: Permission mode: ask before each tool use

session.permissionModeBypass.description: Permission mode: bypass all permission prompts

session.providerUnavailable.description: Suffix shown next to a backend whose CLI is not installed on the node

session.providerUnavailableHint.description: Composer hint shown when the selected backend is not installed on the node

directory.up.description: Button: go to the parent directory

directory.truncated.description: Hint shown when the listing was truncated

session.imageTooLarge.message: الصورة كبيرة جدًا؛ يجب أن تكون كل صورة أقل من 12 ميغابايت.
session.imageTooLarge.description: Warning shown when an image exceeds the size limit

session.imageLimit.message: يمكنك إرفاق ما يصل إلى {count} صورة.
session.imageLimit.description: Warning shown when exceeding the max number of images

session.settingsLocked.message: Settings are locked for this session
session.settingsLocked.description: Settings are locked for this session

session.attachmentTooLarge.message: File is too large; keep each under 50 MB.
session.attachmentTooLarge.description: File is too large; keep each under 50 MB.

session.attachmentLimit.message: You can attach up to {count} files.
session.attachmentLimit.description: You can attach up to {count} files.

notice.slashUnavailable.message: ‏/{command} أمر تفاعلي ولا يمكن تشغيله في جلسة عن بُعد.
notice.slashUnavailable.description: Notice shown when a slash command can't run in a remote session

notice.slashCodexUnsupported.message: ‏/{command} غير متاح لـ Codex في جلسة عن بُعد.
notice.slashCodexUnsupported.description: Notice shown when a Codex slash command isn't supported remotely

notify.enable.description: Tooltip on the notification bell when notifications are off

notify.disable.description: Tooltip on the notification bell when notifications are on

notify.enabled.message: تم تفعيل الإشعارات. سننبّهك عندما تحتاج الجلسة إلى موافقة.

notify.denied.message: الإشعارات محظورة. اسمح بها في إعدادات المتصفح لتلقّي تنبيهات الموافقة.
notify.denied.description: Toast when notification permission is denied

notify.unsupported.message: الإشعارات غير مدعومة على هذا الجهاز.

notify.failed.description: Toast when enabling or disabling notifications errors
